commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content:
King Solomon: Christ. (Apponius)
chariot: the Apostles.
wood of Lebanon: Scripture often calls by the name Lebanon Jerusalem and the people of the Jews. Since the Apostles derived their origin from them, the chariot is appropriately said to be constructed of the wood of Lebanon.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Litter. Septuagint, to conduct his spouse with solemnity; or a throne; though it most probably denotes the bridal bed. (Calmet)
Hebrew apiron. Greek, phoreion.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
